section_miscategorizations.text: The left ankle exam is bilaterally normal.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears internally contradictory to the preceding focused left-ankle findings (ecchymosis, swelling, tenderness). It likely reflects a documentation error (perhaps intended to say 'The right ankle exam is normal bilaterally' or 'The contralateral ankle is normal'). While still an exam finding, the phrasing could mislead a reader about which ankle is abnormal, representing a minor organizational/clarity issue rather than a true section misplacement.
